title: Question about Unit 03s rampage and
wikitext:
[]: Question about: Unit-03's rampage and...             Quote Post by LoCooLaidman » Fri Apr 15, 2011 11:07 am During Unit-03's rampage (2.0), at the scean where Unit-03 is choking Unit-01, are those Asuka's arms? Yeah, I know that those are really the angel's but did the angel somehow grow Asuka's arms? Oh and why does it seem that the only physical contact Shinji and Asuka ever share would be when either of them is choking the other. Some hug, eh?

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Fri Apr 15, 2011 11:40 am Revenge for EoE, nostalgia, indication that A/S will always end in domestic abuse, evidence that R/S is the only relationship where Shinji can be happy, proof that A/S like s&m. Pick one.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 15, 2011 1:09 pm They're not literally Asuka's arms, but the red does imply that Asuka is involved on some level. Note that the strangling is accompanied by penetrative fusion... I guess one could argue that Asuka is ticked that she didn't win the baka , so she's gonna throttle him AND claim him at the same time. Via Eva proxy.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Apr 15, 2011 2:27 pm Kinky. For what it's worth, i think that they might have taken a page out of the manga and the strangulation is somehow related to Asuka's inevitable Traumatic Childhood(™). If nothing else, that glimpse of what's probably chibi-Asuka when Bardiel is pulling her in (the drawing was posted in one of the threads around here, but i can't find it) implies, to me at least, that the Angel is making her rewatch some of the home videos.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Apr 16, 2011 7:57 am Reichu wrote: They're not literally Asuka's arms, but the red does imply that Asuka is involved on some level. Note that the strangling is accompanied by penetrative fusion... I guess one could argue that Asuka is ticked that she didn't win the baka , so she's gonna throttle him AND claim him at the same time. Via Eva proxy.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Apr 16, 2011 12:28 pm Kendrix wrote: I think Bardiel's just taking her form like Rebuild!Zeruel did - neither of them seemed too intrested in the pilot's mind, much like their NGE selves.

[]:             Quote Post by GoGoGengar » Fri Apr 29, 2011 1:01 pm What's A/S and R/S? I think A/S is Asuka/Shinji but what is the R? Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by LoCooLaidman » Fri Apr 29, 2011 1:10 pm GoGoGengar wrote: What's A/S and R/S? I think A/S is Asuka/Shinji but what is the R? Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Apr 29, 2011 3:52 pm The hard question is, what the hell if S/M? Shinji/Misato? Shinji/Mana? Shinji/Mayumi? Shinji/Mari? Shinji/Maria? Or Shinji/Masochism = S/A?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 29, 2011 4:33 pm Guys, what does this current discussion have to do with Eva-03? This isn't a shipping thread. Topic please.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Apr 30, 2011 4:04 am Someone asked about the abbreviations. A lot of the stuff in this forum in incomprehensible if you don't get them. XD To get back to topic, I just want to point out how well these Arms underline hoch much of a unfair bitch the entire situation is and how it thrashes everyone's efforts. NGE!Shinji didn't even budge from the spot, afraid that the slightest countermeasure might kill the person in the entryplug. This time, Shinji knows that the newest addition to his small circle of friends is in there (He has only four of those at this point, counting Rei, and not countig Misato since she's more of a family member/authority person. I don't think Mari can be counted before the finale, they sorta just met at that point) and yet, he still summons up the confidence to try and escape/free himself. He still doesn't trust himself to win this battle without killing Asuka, but he thinks he can escape - before the little resolve he had is shattered by those extra arms, making that little effort meaningless. It's also sort a a "Take That" to everyone who says "Why don't that whimp just try to remove those arms from his neck?" - Well, he managed to do so with little effort, but then, the bastard sprouted new arms! It also makes Gendo's use of Dummy Plug more understandable since it accentuates that it's really fight or die for Shinji now... To further fuel the discussion, here there be pics. Bardiel's Arms: SPOILER: Show

Article: Question about Unit 03s rampage and
. NGE!Shinji didn't even budge from the spot, afraid that the slightest countermeasure might kill the person in the entryplug. This time, Shinji knows that the newest addition to his small circle of friends is in there (He has only four of those at this point, counting Rei, and not countig Misato since she's more of a family member/authority person. I don't think Mari can be counted before the finale, they sorta just met at that point) and yet, he still summons up the confidence to try and escape/free himself. He still doesn't trust himself to win this battle without killing Asuka, but he thinks he can escape - before the little resolve he had is shattered by those extra arms, making that little effort meaningless. It's also sort a a "Take That" to everyone who says "Why don't that whimp just try to remove those arms from his neck?" - Well, he managed to do so with little effort, but then, the bastard sprouted new arms! It also makes Gendo's use of Dummy Plug more understandable since it accentuates that it's really fight or die for Shinji now... To further fuel the discussion, here there be pics.
